## Problem

What practical problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Why this belongs here

Explain why it should live in this project instead of external configuration or downstream code.

## Alternatives considered

List rejected or weaker options.

## Compatibility impact

Mention any breaking change, migration, or documentation impact.
